title: A green kitchen sink for updating regularly
description: A modpack for a rainy day, built for a bit of everything while straying away from in-depth mods such as AE2 or Botania
body:
Have you ever made a kitchen sink pack for your friends? Well so have I!
...To many times to count!

As such, here's a compendium of some of the mods we've enjoyed throughout the years!
Theres:
- Magic (relics, artifacts, Iron's spells)
- Technology (Create, Tetra)
- Storage (Storage drawers, Sophisticated backpacks)
- World Generation (The Yung Suite, The Starmute suite)
- Cute frogs! (Ribbits)
- Decoration fitting a more down to rustic style
- Tea!!
- and so much more!

So what are you waiting for? Download now and start exploring with your friends!
